title: Frequently asked questions about taxes and insurance

items.question: What are the flat-rate tax rates for self-employed in {{year}}?
items.answer:
Band I: {{band1}} CZK
Band II: {{band2}} CZK
Band III: {{band3}} CZK
More information can be found on the official website of the Czech Financial Administration.

items.question: Where can I find the current tax discount amounts?
items.answer: The taxpayer discount for {{year}} is {{taxpayer}} CZK per year. Other discounts and tax benefits are listed on the official public administration portal.
items.linkText: Full overview of tax discounts for {{year}}

items.question: What are the insurance contribution rates for self-employed?
When and how to file a tax return?
items.answer:
Standard deadline: by April 1 of the following year.
Electronic filing: by May 1 of the following year.
Via a tax advisor: by July 1 of the following year.
items.linkText: More information about filing a tax return

items.question: Where can I find the official VAT rates?
items.answer: VAT rates are governed by Act No. 235/2004 Coll. on value added tax. The standard rate is {{vatStandard}}%, the reduced rate is {{vatReduced}}%.

items.question: Where can I get help with my tax obligations?
items.answer: Official advice is provided by the Czech Financial Administration via their helpline, email, or in person at tax offices.
